requirement: An Environmental Impact Assessment is mandatory for all projects specified in the Second Schedule.
remedy: Generate and submit an EIA Report.

requirement: Public participation and consultation must be conducted during the EIA process.
remedy: Log at least 10 community feedback responses.

requirement: EIA reports must be prepared by individuals or firms registered as Lead Experts by NEMA.
remedy: Ensure lead consultant meta-data outlines verified NEMA credentials.

requirement: Environmental Audits must be actively tracked post-approval.
remedy: Initialize audit pipeline schedules post-license acquisition.

requirement: Comprehensive waste management plans are required for industrial operations.
remedy: Produce targeted Waste Management Mitigation structures inside EMP.

requirement: Water extraction or discharge requires definitive permits evaluating baseline hydrology.
remedy: Secure WRMA abstraction permits prior to execution.

requirement: Noise emissions must not exceed explicitly stipulated daytime and nighttime thresholds.
remedy: Apply acoustic barriers; ensure AI noise predictions drop below 'critical' severity.

requirement: Ambient air quality limits cannot be persistently exceeded by operational plume dispersions.
remedy: Enhance dust suppression; ensure modeled AQI remains below critical failure.

requirement: Protect threatened and endangered wildlife habitats near project boundaries.
remedy: Address biodiversity critical alarms via explicit relocation protocols.

requirement: Wetlands and riparian reserves must maintain explicit buffer zones (usually 30m min).
remedy: Push structures beyond hydrological wetland markers.

requirement: Clearance of indigenous forests requires specific conservation exemptions.
remedy: Confirm KFS clearance mapping against NDVI destruction constraints.

requirement: Protection of cultural and heritage sites must be documented if within geographic sweep.
remedy: Initiate NMK site surveys actively.

requirement: Submission of a fully defined Environmental Management Plan (EMP).
remedy: Complete prediction logic to generate operational EMP arrays.

requirement: Restoration bonds may be required for structurally dangerous facilities.
remedy: Draft financial instruments evaluating degradation scales.

requirement: Reporting protocols for hazardous substance spillages must be in place.
remedy: Assign local IoT warning parameters resolving immediate hazards.

requirement: Citizens possess the active right to a clean and healthy environment.
remedy: Address massive negative sentiment spikes through public portals.

requirement: Handling of electronic waste demands strict certification tracking.
remedy: Publish exact E-Waste registry limits.

requirement: Coastal zone protections restricting construction below designated watermark.
remedy: Cross-reference flood simulations shielding littoral boundaries.

requirement: Effluent discharges require explicit quarterly licensing arrays.
remedy: Assess water impact probability maintaining active permits.

requirement: Appeals against NEMA directives must be lodged accurately within 60 days to NET.
remedy: Monitor legal compliance timelines post-EIA submission.
